raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rahd̅s eſi tu/ tu leets
Rains? tu tapſt preeſſch Seru-
babela par Klatjumu? Jo wiꞥſch
atweddihs to Pamattu-Akintni/
a tur wiſſa Galwa brehks:
Schehlaſtiba/ Schehlaſtiba laid
winnau irraid.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta KUNGA Wahrds
notikſe uhs man/ un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Serubabela Rohkas irr
cho Nammu dibbinajſchi/ win-
na Rohkas to arri pabeigs/ ka
juhs ſajuhtat/ ka manni tas
KUNGS Zebnot pee jums irr
uhtijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo kuxsch nizzina to Dee-
u scho maso Leetu ? kur tomehr
ee Septini preezafees/ kad tee
edſchs to Alwa Swarru Seru-
babela Rohkâ/ schahs irr ta
KUNGA Azzis/ kas zaur wiſſu
Semmi eet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad atbildeju es/ un faz-
iju uhs winnu : Rahdi irr tee
iwit Etjes-Rohki pa labbas Roh-
as ta yuktura? un pa winna
reifas Rohkas?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un atkat atbildeju es/ un
fazziju uhs winnu : Kas tee di-
vi Sarrint to Etjes-Rohkn/ kas
ahnis teem diwi Seltu Kanſeem
cr/ kas Seltu no tervim leij?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "un wiꞥſch runnaja uhs
nan/ un fazzija: Ar tu ne fin-
i/ fandas schahs Leetas irr? Un
s fazziju: Ne/mans Kunga.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija: Schee
r tee diwi * Swaiditee/ kas
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "preeſchb ta Kunga wiſſas Sem-
mes stahw.
* Eebr: Wall: Ekjes-Behrni,
Ta V. Nodalla.
Tam Praweetam kuhſt zaar weenu Parahti-
schanu no weenas fkraidaſas Grahmatas: 1.
Un no weenas Seewas/ kas eeſſch weenas
Eepas fehdeja : 2. Sinza dohta/ ka eeſſch
ta jauna uhſzelta Deewa Mamma gan wiſſa-
das Negantibas taps atrafas: 3. Bet co-
mebr no Deewa kuhſs isbeldetas: 4. tc.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "N eg pazehlu ſawas
Wazzis attat/ un ſkatti-
joſs/ un reds/ fatihta
Grahmata ſtrehje.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija uhs
man: Ko redſi tu? Un es fazziju:
Es redsu weenu fatihtu Grah-
matu ſtrejam/ ka Garruns irr
diwidesmits Ohlektis/ un wi-
nas Plattums deſmits Ohlektis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija uhs
man: Schis irr tas Lahsts/ kas
isees pa wiſſas Semmes Wir-
fu/ jo ikkatrs/ kas sohg no fcheim/
ka winna few nenoseedsigu tak-
kahs/ un ikkatrs/ kas nepateefi
ſwehre no fcheim/ ka winna few
nenoseedsigu fakkahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es weddiſchn to preeſcha/
fakka tas KUNGS Zebnot: Ka
tam Lahstam buhs nahſt eeſſch
ta Sagta Naimma/ un eeſſch ta
Naimma/ kas pee manna Wahr-
da nepateefi ſwehre/ un tas pee-
mahjoſs winna Naimma Wid-
du/ un usbeigſs to ar winna Roh-
ku un Akminzeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Engelis/ kas ar
mannim runnaja/ iſgahje/ un
fazzija uhs man: Pazell jelle
Jii taiwas
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
